title: TooGet Natural Lavender Bundles, Freshly Harvested 200+ Stems Dried Lavender Bunch 16" - 18" Long, Decorative Flowers Bouquet for Home Decor, Crafts, Gift, Wedding or Any Occasion
features: Package includes has 200+ stems dried lavender bundles, Weighs about 4 ounces, Measures in between 16" to 18", Beautifully packaged in a gift box.
Selecting Top quality lavender flowers, adopting exquisite processing technology, to maintain the most primitive look and natural beauty of flowers.
Natural lavender, symbol of love, also can help sleep, refresh your mind, fragrance long lasting, floral scent can last longer than 1-2 years, and the smell fades over time,great for aromatherapy.
Beautiful and comfortable. Not easily moldy, Perfect for decorating living, dining or study room, also perfect for decorating office, wedding.
Notice: The dried flowers will fall off a bit during the delivery that is a normal phenomenon. We will enclose a lavender bag for you to collect in, you can put it in your closet or hanging up.
description: Product Description V ery fragrant Lavender bundles,you can add some lavender to a small muslin bag which you put in your dryer so your linens have a wonderful aroma and you have a peaceful night's sleep. our quality lavender flowers are 100% natural. They are sourced from trusted farmers around the world and hand-picked from the finest harvests each year, They are also raw, which mean, they go through a very minimal process. 100% Raw Lavender Bundles Selecting top quality lavender flowers, adopting exquisite processing technology, to maintain the most primitive look and natural beauty of flowers. Very Fragrant and High Quality Lavender Bunches Beautiful and comfortable. Not easily moldy, Perfect for decorating living, dining or study room, also perfect for decorating office, wedding. Wonderful Lavender Bundles Clean Perfect for weddings and any decor around your house. Handpicked, also a wonderful gift for your family or friends. Fresh Lavender flowers are purple in color and the language of Lavender Flower is everlasting love. Also can help sleep, refresh your mind. Home Great decoration for home, wedding party, bar, office, etc. Wonderful gift for Mother's Day, Valentine Day, birthday and other special events. Gift 100% natural dried lavender flowers, poisonless and harmless, favored by customers. Multipurpose Farmers picking, air natural dried lavender, flowers are not exactly the same as every one. But each sticks of flower be beautiful and unique. Looking for more Flowers and Herbs? About US ? We have many kinds of flowers, can be adding to salads, soups, stew, baked goods, teas and other beverages, also great for making floral water, facial toners, soaps, bath bomb, shampoo, lotions, creams, Rich in fragrance makes these ideal for use in potpourris, sachets and wedding decor. hope you like it too. TooGet Technology was founded on August 8,2008, The company has been devoted to designing and supplying high quality products to distributors and customers around the world. In TooGet, mutual development, mutual benefits,only high quality. We are looking forward to forming successful business relationships with new clients around the world in the near future.
